summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM application with FastAPI backend and React frontend. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI working correctly with all core features operational including user registration, authentication, CRUD operations for contacts/leads/deals/activities, and dashboard metrics display.

ui_bugs.issue: Activity type dropdown selection not working with direct click, requires keyboard navigation
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can use keyboard arrows + Enter to select

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Dashboard metrics display (contacts, leads, deals, total value)
Contact CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Lead CRUD operations with kanban pipeline view
Deal CRUD operations with stage management
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Contacts, Leads, Deals, Activities)
Responsive UI layout with proper design identity
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests), Frontend: 95% (minor dropdown interaction issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor UI dropdown interaction issue in Activity creation modal - ensure SelectItem components are properly clickable in modal context. Consider adding aria-describedby attributes to Dialog components to resolve accessibility warnings.
